ModMetaData.name: RimDroid CJK Font
ModMetaData.author: RimDroid
ModMetaData.description:
Adds CJK (Chinese/Japanese/Korean) glyphs by swapping RimWorld's UI font with an embedded Noto Sans CJK font at runtime, keeping resources.assets untouched.
Built for RimDroid (Android / box64 + Zink), where Unity's OS-font discovery never runs, so the desktop "install a system CJK font" fix does not work, and where editing resources.assets corrupts the streamed TMP SDF atlases. This mod sidesteps both: the font is shipped as a self-contained AssetBundle (embedded TTF, rasterized by Unity's built-in FreeType) and injected into Verse.Text's GUIStyles at startup.
